channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: ETH eyes breakout: bulls own the lane, bears beware. a break above 2,151 opens a rush toward 2,300. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260330-price-prediction-eth-ethereum-targets-2150-breakout-following-technical #ETH #Crypto #Trading
